items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona views corporate vs local reporting split. However, there is no evidence provided that directly supports the execution or outcome of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any relevant data or results that confirm the expected behavior, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
